flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Martin Community College are 23% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($26.0k vs $33.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Martin Community College fell 35% between 2006 and 2009 (16.0% → 10.4%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Martin Community College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.5k → $8.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Martin Community College rose 32% between 2021 and 2024 ($1.9k → $2.5k).
